librariesUsed.name: GSAP
librariesUsed.purpose: Core animation engine — scroll reveals, accordion motion, card hover lift, SVG connector drawing, chat message entrances

librariesUsed.name: Tippy.js
librariesUsed.purpose: Soft-cloud tooltip popups with custom watercolor styling

librariesUsed.name: Splitting.js
librariesUsed.purpose: Per-character cascade text reveal for view titles

interactionsImplemented.buttonHover: watercolor-bleed-fill — CSS radial gradient follows cursor via JS position tracking
interactionsImplemented.buttonClick: paint-splatter-micro — JS-created splatter element at click point with burst animation
interactionsImplemented.cardHover: wash-border-bleed — CSS ::after gradient mask border that appears on hover
interactionsImplemented.pageTransition: watercolor-wash-wipe — Full-screen radial gradient overlay sweeps horizontally
interactionsImplemented.scrollReveal: paint-stroke-reveal — GSAP ScrollTrigger fade-up with staggered timing
interactionsImplemented.navItemHover: wash-highlight-appear — CSS radial gradient background appears behind nav item
interactionsImplemented.navItemActive: paint-dot-indicator — 6px accent dot with glow shadow
interactionsImplemented.inputFocus: soft-blush-border-glow — CSS border-color + box-shadow transition with gaussian blur
interactionsImplemented.toggleSwitch: smooth-slide-soft — GSAP-enhanced thumb slide with slow easing
interactionsImplemented.tooltips: soft-cloud-popup — Tippy.js with custom rounded cloud styling and blurred edge glow
interactionsImplemented.loadingState: paint-drip-fill — Three colored drip elements with staggered scaleY animation
interactionsImplemented.idleAmbient: color-wash-drift — Canvas-based slow-drifting radial gradient pastel blobs
interactionsImplemented.microFeedback: petal-float-away — JS-spawned petal shapes that float up and fade

navigationPattern: hash-based routing with data-view buttons and data-page sections
antiRepeatCompliance: No blue-purple blob morphing (Pass 1) — uses soft pastel watercolor washes instead
No deep ocean dark theme (Pass 2) — uses light watercolor white canvas
No dark chrome/mercury metallic (Pass 3) — uses soft pastel painterly aesthetic
No magnetic snap interactions (Pass 3) — uses soft bleed and paint-stroke interactions
No terminal-sleek chrome chat (Pass 3) — uses handwritten letter watercolor chat
